endpoints.purpose: Toggle bookmark for the current candidate
Submit an application for a job
Get or update a candidate profile
Get or update an employer profile
List jobs posted by an employer
List applications received by an employer
Send a test email via AbstractEmail::test_send(); response shape: {sent: bool, to: string, logged: int}. Log row status is sent_test or failed_test (never pollutes production delivery metrics).
Public app config used by frontend blocks
Report a published job for moderator review (anti-spam flag)
Resolve report flags on a job (dismiss or unpublish)
Self-service GDPR export/erase request for the logged-in candidate
Toggle a company bookmark for the current user
Read or update the current user's own account (display_name, email, current_password, new_password)

settings.controls: Main plugin settings (listings/pages/notifications tabs) — registered via Settings API in admin/class-admin-settings.php
WCB app-page IDs (where blocks live); read via wcb_app_page_ids filter
DB schema version, used by Install::maybe_upgrade()
Default wcb_board ID used when no board attribute is supplied
Cache busting key for jobs index
IDs of sample data inserted by setup wizard
Whether sample data is currently installed
Per-email enable/from/subject — consolidated under wcb_settings in 1.2.0 (F-5). Read via wcb_get_email_settings() helper.
Captcha driver slug — consolidated under wcb_settings in 1.2.0 (F-5). Read via wcb_get_captcha_driver() helper.
Public Resume Archive toggle — Listings tab. Owns wcb_resume CPT visibility (F-3). Filter: wcb_resume_archive_enabled.

services.purpose: Main settings page (Listings / Pages / Notifications tabs)

Centralized read accessor for the wcb_settings option. Single read path across Free + Pro; uniform array_key_exists semantic eliminates the absent-vs-falsy drift class. Writers (admin sanitizer, REST endpoint) stay on get_option/update_option directly.

Static value-object for company brand/meta. serialize(int $company_id) returns the canonical company-meta payload; size_label(string) maps a size slug to its display label. Consumed by both the companies and jobs endpoints — replaces the two duplicate private size_label() methods removed in the R1/R2 dedup.
Documented Free→Pro filter API surface — single source of truth for what Pro is allowed to hook
Map theme accent → wcb-* CSS vars
reCAPTCHA / Turnstile gate on submit hooks
Gates /wp/v2/wcb_board reads on edit_posts so boards (admin-only config) are not anonymously enumerable
wcb_job CPT + taxonomies + meta + cron sub-services
JSON-LD JobPosting + OG tags + RSS enrichment

Resolver for the 7 canonical Career Board pages (Post a Job, dashboards, archives, registration). get_id() reads wcb_settings then falls back to slug match. backfill_from_slugs() runs once at install/upgrade to populate missing IDs.
Coordinates the wcb_location taxonomy with company HQ data. Reserves 'remote' / 'other' slugs, syncs free-text HQ input into terms, scopes the employer job-form dropdown to HQ + Remote + Other.

cron.purpose: Expire jobs whose deadline has passed
Demote featured jobs once featured-until elapses
Email candidates/employers about jobs nearing deadline

security.uploads_gate: Resume + logo uploads gated by REST permission_callback (login + ownership)
security.csrf: All write endpoints rely on REST cookie-nonce auth (X-WP-Nonce); admin-post handlers call wp_verify_nonce
security.abilities_api: All capability checks go via wp_is_authorized() — no current_user_can('manage_options')

ci_guards.script: composer scripts (phpcs, phpstan, phpunit), Grunt copy:dist, .lighthouserc.json, bin/check-pro-decoupling.sh (F-6 — blocks Free→Pro coupling regressions)

coding_rules: All globals prefixed wcb_ (functions, options, hooks, meta, CPTs, taxonomies, tables)
Namespace WCB\ (sub-namespaces map via spl_autoload_register in main file)
REST namespace wcb/v1 — every controller extends WCB\Api\REST_Controller
Capabilities through Abilities API only — wp_register_ability + wp_is_authorized; never current_user_can('manage_options')
Frontend = Interactivity API only — zero jQuery, zero admin-ajax
Pro mirrors Free (WCBPro\ namespace, identical patterns)

build_commands.release: npm run build (Gruntfile.js copy:dist) — uses .distignore to drop dev assets
build_commands.ci_local: composer test  /  composer phpcs  /  composer phpstan

emails.purpose: Confirm to candidate that application was received
Guest applicant receipt with magic link
Notify candidate when application status changes
Notify employer their job was approved
Notify admin/employer that a job is pending review
Notify employer their job was rejected

notes.ajax: Plugin is Interactivity-API + REST only. There are zero plugin-own admin-ajax actions. The 'ajax' baseline grep returned 0, matching the manifest's empty array — coverage 100% by the rule that 0/0 is exact.
notes.hooks_fired: 70 unique hook names (28 do_action + 42 apply_filters), exhaustively enumerated via xargs grep. Wrapper-style hooks (e.g., wcb_settings_tab_{slug}) are listed once with the dynamic suffix. Filter call-sites that re-fire the same hook in different files are deduped on hook name.
notes.wp_cli: Baseline counts WP_CLI::add_command calls (4); manifest groups subcommands under each top-level command, so the four manifest entries map 1:1 to the four registrations.
round-6-1.2.0: F-5 (1.2.0): wcb_email_settings + wcb_captcha_driver options consolidated into wcb_settings.emails + wcb_settings.captcha.driver. Legacy options deleted by core/class-install.php migration on db_version 1.0 → 1.2 bump.
F-3 (1.2.0): wcb_resume CPT visibility now owned by wcb_settings.resume_archive_enabled (default false). Pro flips it on activation; site-owner override via wcb_resume_archive_enabled filter.
F-4 (1.2.0): allow_withdraw setting deprecated → wcb_withdraw_application ability. Setting tombstoned for one cycle, removed in 1.3.0.
F-6 (1.2.0): bin/check-pro-decoupling.sh wired into .github/workflows/ci.yml as a blocking job. Catches direct WCB\Pro\ refs, wcbp_*() calls, WCBP_ constant reads.
F-1 + F-2 (1.2.0): core/class-pro-coordination.php declares 11 documented filters + 2 actions Pro is allowed to hook. 22 callsites migrated; zero direct Pro references remain in Free runtime code.

generated.refresh_notes: 2026-07-13 diff-driven refresh on branch 1.7.0 (post-1.6.0 release). git diff since the 2026-07-09 pass covers only the 1.5.1 QA-verified bug fixes + the 1.6.0 release merge; ground-truth grep of the diff shows ZERO added/removed register_rest_route, do_action/apply_filters, add_shortcode, CREATE TABLE, wp_schedule, admin pages, WP_CLI commands, or block registrations — all fixes were inside existing function bodies. All category counts carried forward unchanged. plugin.version bumped 1.5.1->1.6.0 to match the released tag. --- PRIOR NOTE --- 2026-07-09 diff-driven refresh for 1.5.1 release (branch 1.4.0 -> 1.5.1). Re-enumerated only categories whose source files changed since the 2026-06-10 (1.4.0) pass. HOOKS (source **/*.php): ground-truth grep over the 177-file distribution scope (was 175) using the maintainer's established methodology (all non-comment do_action/apply_filters CALL sites, multi-line included): 51 do_action + 143 apply_filters = 194 firing sites (was 189: 48+141), 110 unique names (was 108). Reproduces the 1.4.0 baseline exactly (48+141=189 / 108 unique) at tag v1.4.0, so +5 sites / +2 unique is a real delta. NET hook-name delta v1.4.0->HEAD: +3 new (wcb_default_filter_order filter @ blocks/job-listings/render.php:42 [1.5.1 filter-sidebar reorder]; wcb_employer_banned + wcb_employer_unbanned actions @ admin/class-admin-employers.php:181,184 [employer ban]); -1 removed (wcb_theme_primary_color, was modules/themeintegration/class-theme-integration-module.php:54). hooks_fired[] (representative, not 1:1 with count per prior-pass practice): removed wcb_theme_primary_color; added the 3 new hooks; also added 4 pre-existing-but-unrecorded render.php do_actions (wcb_job_listings_filters_top:491, wcb_job_listings_filters_bottom:679, wcb_before_card_footer:772, wcb_after_card_footer:777); refreshed 5 drifted render.php line numbers. Other changed-file line drift left as-is per counts-only array policy. REST (api/**,core/**,modules/**): jobs-endpoint + admin-endpoint changed but registered NO new routes; count stays 41 register_rest_route call sites across 12 files. Exhaustive re-enum surfaced ONE pre-existing gap: /wcb/v1/account (AccountEndpoint::get_account|update_account, since 1.2.0) was in code and already counted in the 41 but MISSING from rest.endpoints[]; added it. STABLE (sources changed, counts re-verified unchanged): admin_pages 9, tables 3 (DB_VERSION still 1.2.7), blocks 17, cron 4, wp_cli 5. NOTE: new WCB\Core\FormCustomFields (core/class-form-custom-fields.php) is a static helper, not a container service; services left at 39. capabilities/shortcodes/post_types/taxonomies not re-enumerated (out of diff scope). --- PRIOR NOTE (2026-06-10, 1.4.0) --- 2026-06-10 count reconciliation for 1.4.0 release. All counts re-enumerated from ground-truth grep over 175 plugin-own PHP files (.distignore distribution scope, vendor/tests/build/src/audit/bin/docs/plan/marketing/libs excluded). Counts updated: rest 43->41 (41 actual register_rest_route() call sites across 12 files; 43 was an overcount from a transitional intermediate state); shortcodes 11->2 (add_shortcode() call sites: 1 loop in core/class-plugin.php registers 18 unique tags + 1 in widgets/class-widget-shortcode.php; old 11 was a unique-tag count); capabilities 12->13 (wcb_access_admin_jobs now in class-roles.php sync array, lacks a registered ability — capabilities[] detail array still has 12 ability-backed entries); hooks_fired 175->189 (ground-truth 48 do_action + 141 apply_filters call sites, comments/docblocks excluded; prior 175 was incomplete); hooks_unique 101->108 (40 unique do_action + 68 unique apply_filters names); cron 3->4 (4 call sites: jobs-expiry daily + single-event re-arm + featured-expiry daily + deadline-reminders daily; prior 3 missed class-jobs-expiry.php:142 single-event). Stable: ajax 0, admin_pages 9, blocks 17, tables 3, services 39, wp_cli 5. Detail arrays (rest[], hooks_fired[], shortcodes[], capabilities[]) were NOT re-enumerated this pass; only counts were reconciled.
generated.note: 2026-06-08 (11:02Z) targeted REFRESH after the big-site + cleanup wave on branch 1.2.1 (commits cd9fa64, 0c0ed42, 2b8c4a2, 047e6a9, a1b8ded; last manifest refresh was 4894736). Ground-truth grep over the .distignore distribution scope (172 plugin-own PHP files now, was 171 — the +1 is NEW core/class-company-meta-shape.php; libs/edd-sl-sdk vendored SDK excluded). Two static-analysis findings CLEARED this wave: (1) grid_track_overflow_risks 51->0 — every bare 1fr grid track across 18 CSS files was wrapped to minmax(0,1fr); ground-truth grep for a bare 1fr in a grid-template declaration outside minmax() now returns 0 (auto-fill/auto-fit repeat() tracks like minmax(160px,1fr) are intentional and never were overflow risks). (2) rest_hang_risks 68->11 — the 57 block view.js fetch() sites were the resolved set: all 9 data-fetching block view.js now `import { wcbFetch } from '@wcb/fetch'` and call wcbFetch() instead of native fetch(); wcbFetch (assets/js/modules/wcb-fetch.js, registered as the @wcb/fetch script module in core/class-plugin.php via wp_register_script_module on init, declared as a dep in each block's view.asset.php) wraps fetch with a 15000ms AbortController timeout that composes any caller signal. The 11 REMAINING rest_hang_risks are all admin-side and OUT OF SCOPE of this wave: assets/js/admin.js (5 wp.apiFetch), assets/js/wizard.js (3 wp.apiFetch), assets/js/admin/application-detail.js (1 native fetch), assets/js/admin/emails.js (2 native fetch) — none route through wcbFetch yet. NEW class: WCB\Core\CompanyMetaShape (core/class-company-meta-shape.php, static serialize()+size_label()), added to services -> services count 37->38; both the companies and jobs endpoints now consume it and the two duplicate private size_label() methods were removed (R1/R2 dedup); employers-endpoint gained a private owner_visible_statuses() helper. perf pass touched modules/jobs/class-jobs-expiry.php (bounded batch + cron re-arm), modules/gdpr/class-gdpr-module.php (page-based eraser/exporter), api/endpoints/class-employers-endpoint.php + class-jobs-endpoint.php (batch-prime cache_users/_prime_post_caches), core/class-install.php (bounded dedupe drain) — all edits inside existing files, no new endpoints/hooks/tables/blocks/cron. antispam class-anti-spam-module.php save_settings() now gates solely on wp_is_ability_granted (redundant current_user_can removed). STABLE this wave (ground-truth verified, not assumed): REST 38 register_rest_route sites = 41 endpoint entries; blocks 17 block.json; tables (4 CREATE TABLE incl. one non-schema string = 3 schema); wp_cli 5 WP_CLI::add_command; cron 3 events; add_shortcode 2 sites (1 source registrar). hooks_fired held at 173 (43 do_action + 130 apply_filters enumerated): diff of cd9fa64..a1b8ded vs 4894736 shows ZERO net hook call sites added/removed (the single touched do_action('wcb_job_expired') was an in-place argument re-cast, same site), so the per-call-site enumeration is unchanged. NOTE: a ground-truth grep of the full dist scope counts 188 raw do_action+apply_filters call sites (48+140) vs the 173 enumerated — this delta is PRE-EXISTING manifest drift carried since earlier sessions (the enumeration omits some sites), NOT introduced by this wave; left as-is per refresh-only scope, flagged for the next full audit-only re-run. static_analysis.dead_listeners remains empty. db_version still 1.2.7 (no schema change this wave). --- PRIOR NOTE (2026-06-08 09:35Z): targeted refresh after the 1.2.x bug-fix wave on branch 1.2.1 (commits ef03384..998efee). Ground-truth grep over the .distignore distribution scope (171 plugin-own PHP files, libs/edd-sl-sdk vendored SDK excluded). Resolved the long-standing drift the previous note flagged as 'queued for next full refresh': REST endpoints re-enumerated 36->41 entries covering all 38 register_rest_route() call sites — added 5 routes that were live in code but missing from the manifest (candidates/saved-companies, candidates/saved-resumes, candidates/me/privacy/(export|erase), companies/{id}/bookmark, admin/emails/log); blocks re-enumerated 15->17 to add job-alert-card and similar-companies-card (both static render.php blocks). STABLE this session: ajax 0, wp_cli 5, add_shortcode 1 source registrar, tables (3 schema tables; grep counts 4 CREATE TABLE incl. one non-schema string), cron 3 events. hooks_fired retains its per-call-site enumeration (173 sites = 43 do_action + 130 apply_filters call sites; ground-truth unique names 37 actions + 66 filters = 103) — unchanged this session, no hook sites added/removed. This session's commits added ZERO new REST routes/blocks/shortcodes/tables/cron; all six commits are bug fixes within existing files: BoardsModule::ensure_default_board() made race-safe via an add_option() lock + self-heal adopt; core/class-install.php DB_VERSION 1.2.6->1.2.7 with a new private dedupe_default_boards() run under a 1.2.7 upgrade gate to collapse duplicate Main Board posts left by the pre-fix race; setup-wizard seeder re-tracks existing sample IDs on re-run and drops a dead _wcb_user_id company-meta write; email-settings enqueue_assets() now loads on the settings page regardless of ?tab (was gated on ?tab=emails which never matched the hash-based tabs); job-search-hero render.php falls back to get_post_type_archive_link('wcb_job') when jobs_archive_page is unset; and the EDD SL SDK was relocated vendor/edd-sl-sdk -> libs/edd-sl-sdk (with built assets) so it ships in release zips (vendored lib, not a tracked manifest category). No new dead listeners; static_analysis.dead_listeners remains empty.

rest_js_contract_drift.fix: Rename PHP key to 'reason' OR update JS to read existing key. Add JSON contract fixture.

cap_drift.manage_options_gate_note: Count of bare current_user_can('manage_options') checks in plugin paths. High numbers signal under-delegated permissions.
